subcodes.first_line: O scion of that glorious father! Thy letter was received and its contents brought fresh joy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سلیل آن پدر جلیل نامه رسید و مضمون سبب فرح جدید گردید محبت حقیقی و انجذاب
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @love of God
